task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the FreeMED application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the FreeMED dashboard or main interface indicating a successful login, potentially showing the username 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the correct patient record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the patient name 'Hobert Wuckert' or patient ID '11' prominently displayed in the patient context area, header, or search results.

task_completion.description: Verify the referral provider, specialty, and date are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a referral form with 'Dr. Kevin Ramirez' (Provider/To), 'Orthopedic Surgery' (Specialty), and '2025-05-10' (Date) entered into the respective input fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct referral reason is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Right knee pain and swelling following sports injury. MRI shows suspected meniscal tear with joint effusion.' in the reason, description, or notes field of the referral form.

task_completion.description: Verify the referral was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success notification (e.g., 'Referral saved', 'Added successfully') or the newly created referral visible in the patient's list of active referrals.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the FreeMED web GUI to create the referral.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the FreeMED application interface, not a terminal, command prompt, or API client executing backend commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must be the genuine FreeMED web application with standard navigation menus and forms, not a notepad, text editor, or blank HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify browser developer tools were not used to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no open browser console, network tab, or 'Inspect Element' panels visible that could be used to manipulate the page DOM to fake a success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Details: Hobert Wuckert (ID: 11, DOB: 2000-10-27). Referral Details -> To: Dr. Kevin Ramirez, Specialty: Orthopedic Surgery, Date: 2025-05-10, Reason: 'Right knee pain and swelling following sports injury. MRI shows suspected meniscal tear with joint effusion.'
